summary_en: 1,000,000 shares (8.2% of outstanding), ¥2.5B upper limit, open-market purchase via Tokyo Stock Exchange, May 15–December 31, 2026. Execution authority granted May 14, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Innotech Corporation's board of directors resolved on May 14, 2026 to acquire up to 1,000,000 treasury shares (8.2% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum outlay of ¥2.5 billion. Acquisition will occur via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 15 and December 31, 2026. The buyback is undertaken as part of the company's capital policy framework to improve capital efficiency and enhance shareholder returns. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 1,525,314 treasury shares against 12,174,686 issued shares (excluding treasury stock).
